# getascraper/how-to-scrape-landandfarm

> LandAndFarm Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts rural land listings, pricing, acreage, and broker contact details from LandAndFarm.com. Free tier available.

## Overview
- LandAndFarm scraper and US rural land listing data extraction API
- Extracts: asking price, price per acre, acreage, property type, county, broker contact details
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-landandfarm/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/landandfarm-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~landandfarm-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/landandfarm-scraper

## How it works
1. Give it a state, a land type, or paste direct LandAndFarm search or property links
2. The actor visits each matching listing and collects the published details
3. Every listing is returned as one flat row with price, acreage, location, and broker contact details

## Target site characteristics
- Publicly listed rural land parcels including farms, ranches, timberland, hunting land, and recreational land
- Coverage spans all 50 US states down to county and city level
- Hundreds of thousands of active listings updated continuously

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://www.landandfarm.com/search/{state-slug}-land-for-sale/
- https://www.landandfarm.com/property/{listing-slug}/

## Pricing
- Free tier: included
- Paid: $1.49 per 1,000 results

## Output schema (highlights)
- price: Asking price in US dollars
- pricePerAcre: Price divided by acreage, computed automatically
- acres: Lot size in acres
- county: County name
- propertyType: Primary land category
- brokerName, brokerCompany, brokerPhone, brokerEmail: Full broker contact details

## Use cases
- Land investor comparing price per acre across states and counties
- Real estate brokerage building a contact list of active rural land brokers

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-landandfarm/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~landandfarm-scraper/issues
